https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/r.commit_message:
Bug 1955956 - Reduce arrowpanel padding on small screen sizes when not using touch density. r=desktop-theme-reviewers,dao

In order to decrease the chances of needing vertical scrollbars on
things like the app menu.

The app menu takes ~800px, so I chose that plus some slack for toolbars
and so on.

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D242705
Backed out changeset a504be51755a (bug 1955956) for affecting various macOS configurations by default.
